description_long: This is a medium-sized woven handbag with a geometric pattern in dark blue and natural beige tones. The body of the bag is slightly trapezoidal, with a wide opening at the top and a narrower base. Two long, thin handles made of a light-colored material are attached to the upper rim, allowing the bag to be carried over the shoulder. The woven texture is prominent, giving the bag a semi-soft, tactile feel, and the pattern consists of interlocking diagonal lines and shapes. The closure appears to be a simple drawstring or tie at the top center, with no visible hardware or embellishments. The overall design is casual and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A woven geometric-patterned handbag in blue and beige with long light handles and a drawstring closure, featuring a casual, textured look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric pattern, wide opening, and both handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and the thickness of the woven material.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the geometric pattern and handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the woven texture.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, fixed shoulder straps made of light-colored material, non-adjustable, attached at the top rim.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Drawstring closure at the top center, with visible ties.
attribute_pattern: Geometric pattern with interlocking diagonal lines in dark blue and beige.
